title: Garlicky Chewy Turkish Garlic Pilaf
description: A flavorful and chewy Turkish dish featuring the sweetness of peach juice, perfect for festive occasions. This recipe is vegan-friendly and packed with the essence of garlic and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the basmati rice and stir to coat the rice in oil and mix with garlic.
Pour in the peach juice and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and season with salt, black pepper, and turmeric (if using).
Transfer the rice to a serving platter and sprinkle with chopped parsley and cilantro.
Drizzle with pomegranate molasses (if using) and red pepper flakes (if using).
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges and additional parsley and cilantro (if desired).
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
